drug.searchDescription: Search the FDA database for educational drug information.
drug.disclaimer: openFDA data is for educational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice.

prescription.uploadDescription: Securely upload your prescription to get started.
prescription.uploadHint: Drag and drop your file here, or click to browse from your computer.
prescription.fileFormats: JPEG, PNG or PDF up to 10MB
prescription.analyzingDescription: Our AI is extracting prescription details...
prescription.securityNote: Your data is encrypted and processed securely.

ai.educationDescription: Enter text to receive educational health information.
ai.disclaimer: This is not medical advice and does not diagnose, treat, or prescribe. Always consult a licensed healthcare professional.

ocr.disclaimer: OCR results are machine-generated and require human confirmation before any medical use.
ocr.lowConfidence: Low confidence — please verify results carefully.

disclaimers.general: Educational information only. This is not medical advice.
disclaimers.footer1: Pharmawise provides educational information only and does not diagnose or prescribe.
disclaimers.footer2: Always confirm medical decisions with a licensed professional.

tips.title: Tips for best results:
tips.lighting: Ensure good lighting and avoid glare on the paper.
tips.steady: Keep the camera steady and parallel to the document.
tips.visible: Make sure all text, especially handwriting, is clearly visible.
